ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the material entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the material entry was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the material entry was last modified */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., semiconductor, metal) */,
  "application_area" TEXT /* Application area (e.g., semiconductors, thermoelectrics, batteries) */,
  "crystal_structure" TEXT /* Crystal structure (e.g., cubic, hexagonal) */,
  "synthesis_method" TEXT /* Method used to synthesize the material */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atomic_units" (
  "atomic_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atomic unit entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material to which the atomic unit belongs */,
  "na_atom_unit" REAL /* Number of atoms of element A in the unit cell */,
  "nb_atom_unit" REAL /* Number of atoms of element B in the unit cell */,
  "nc_atom_unit" REAL /* Number of atoms of element C in the unit cell */,
  "valence_con_a" REAL /* Valence configuration of element A */,
  "valence_con_b" REAL /* Valence configuration of element B */,
  "valence_con_c" REAL /* Valence configuration of element C */,
  "atomic_mass" REAL /* Atomic mass of the element */,
  "atomic_radius" REAL /* Atomic radius */,
  "electronegativity" REAL /* Electronegativity */,
  "oxidation_states" TEXT /* Common oxidation states of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atomic_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atomic_units_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electronic_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electronic property entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material to which the electronic property belongs */,
  "hse_band_gap_eV" REAL /* HSE band gap in electron volts */,
  "lvb_window" REAL /* Lower valence band window */,
  "lcb_window" REAL /* Lower conduction band window */,
  "b_gpa" REAL /* Bulk modulus in GPa */,
  "average_mh" REAL /* Average mobility in the hole region */,
  "anisotropy_mh" REAL /* Anisotropy of mobility in the hole region */,
  "vb_extrema_0_1eV" REAL /* Valence band extrema within 0.1 eV of the Fermi level */,
  "cb_extrema_0_1eV" REAL /* Conduction band extrema within 0.1 eV of the Fermi level */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Kelvin */,
  "kpa" REAL /* Thermal conductivity in W/mK */,
  "n_optimal" REAL /* Optimal carrier concentration */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., semiconductor, metal) */,
  "zt" REAL /* Figure of merit (ZT) for thermoelectric performance */,
  "conductivity_type" TEXT /* Type of conductivity (e.g., n-type, p-type) */,
  "carrier_concentration" REAL /* Carrier concentration */,
  "lattice_constant" REAL /* Lattice constant */,
  "fermi_level" REAL /* Fermi level */,
  "dielectric_constant" REAL /* Dielectric constant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electronic_properties_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "density_of_states" (
  "dos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each density of states entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material to which the density of states belongs */,
  "vb_dos_at_0_1_states_atom" REAL /* Density of states at 0.1 states per atom in the valence band */,
  "cb_dos_at_0_1_states_atom" REAL /* Density of states at 0.1 states per atom in the conduction band */,
  "total_dos" REAL /* Total density of states */,
  "spin_polarization" REAL /* Spin polarization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_density_of_states_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pocket_densities" (
  "pocket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pocket density entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material to which the pocket density belongs */,
  "pocket_1e18" REAL /* Number of pockets at 1E18 cm^-3 */,
  "pocket_1e19" REAL /* Number of pockets at 1E19 cm^-3 */,
  "pocket_1e20" REAL /* Number of pockets at 1E20 cm^-3 */,
  "pocket_1e21" REAL /* Number of pockets at 1E21 cm^-3 */,
  "pocket_1e22" REAL /* Number of pockets at 1E22 cm^-3 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pocket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pocket_densities_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electronic_mobilities" (
  "mobility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electronic mobility entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material to which the electronic mobility belongs */,
  "average_me" REAL /* Average mobility in the electron region */,
  "anisotropy_me" REAL /* Anisotropy of mobility in the electron region */,
  "mobility_type" TEXT /* Type of mobility (e.g., intrinsic, extrinsic) */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range for mobility measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mobility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electronic_mobilities_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material to which the version belongs */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the material data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_versions_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_access_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
